title: mentha crenigena
intro: Mentha crenigena, also known as the toothed peppermint or prickled mint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to Eastern Europe and Western Asia and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Mentha crenigena include relieving digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Mentha crenigena can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and tinctures, to promote overall well-being.
